title: achras tabogaensis
intro: Achras tabogaensis, also known as the tree tomato or tamarillo, is a type of fruit-bearing shrub native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. The health benefits of Achras tabogaensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and even act as an antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
